content.content: Read the content on webpage www.informations.com.

```python
url = "www.informations.com"
content = get_webpage(url)

if type(content) == "NoneType":
    content = get_webpage("https://www.informations.com")

if type(content) == "NoneType":
    content = get_webpage("http://www.informations.com")

if type(content) == "NoneType":
    raise ValueError("No webpage content found for the provided URL.")

print(content)
```
